constraints.description: Budget must cover total ride construction cost
constraints.label: Cost constraint
constraints.name: cost_constraint

constraints.description: Each ride requires at least 5 staff members to operate
constraints.label: Staffing constraint
constraints.name: staffing_constraint

constraints.description: Each ride needs at least 400 sq ft of plot space
constraints.label: Space constraint
constraints.name: space_constraint

constraints.description: Ticket revenue must cover at least 10% of budget (budget_tenth is budget/10)
constraints.label: Revenue constraint
constraints.name: revenue_constraint

description: Plan an optimal theme park layout by deciding how many rides to build, how much land to use, how many staff to hire, and what to charge for tickets -- all while staying within budget and space constraints.
name: Theme Park Planning

objectives.label: Maximize the number of rides to attract more visitors
objectives.name: maximize_rides

objectives.label: Minimize total budget to reduce financial risk
objectives.name: minimize_budget

soft_constraints.description: Families prefer parks with a roller coaster; not strictly required
soft_constraints.label: Kid-friendly preference
soft_constraints.name: prefer_roller_coaster

variables.label: Total construction and operating budget in dollars
variables.name: budget

variables.label: 10% of budget (auxiliary variable for revenue constraint)
variables.name: budget_tenth

variables.label: Whether the park includes a roller coaster (0=no, 1=yes)
variables.name: has_roller_coaster

variables.label: Minimum plot space required in sq ft (auxiliary: ride_count * 400)
variables.name: min_plot

variables.label: Total plot size in square feet
variables.name: plot_size

variables.label: Total ride construction cost in dollars (auxiliary: ride_count * 25000)
variables.name: ride_cost

variables.label: Number of staff members to hire
variables.name: staff

variables.label: Ticket price per visitor in dollars
variables.name: ticket_price

variables.label: Total ticket revenue for 1000 visitors (auxiliary: ticket_price * 1000)
variables.name: ticket_revenue

additional_constraints.description: The park must include a roller coaster in this scenario
additional_constraints.label: Roller coaster required
additional_constraints.name: require_roller_coaster

additional_constraints.description: A roller coaster needs a park with at least 5 rides for a viable experience
additional_constraints.label: Minimum rides for roller coaster park
additional_constraints.name: min_rides_for_coaster

what_if_scenarios.description: Explore what happens when the park commits to having a roller coaster with a minimum ride count of 5. Uses push/pop to temporarily add constraints and compare results against the base scenario.
what_if_scenarios.name: Add Roller Coaster
